creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Mar 16 21:33:02 2013
New Revision: 314386
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314386

Log:
  - Update to 0.10.0
  
  PR:		ports/176868
  Submitted by:	Jin-Sih Lin <linpct@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/node/files/patch-install   (contents, props changed)
Deleted:
  head/www/node/files/patch-wafadmin-Node.py
Modified:
  head/www/node/Makefile
  head/www/node/distinfo
  head/www/node/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/node/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node/Makefile	Sat Mar 16 21:15:33 2013	(r314385)
+++ head/www/node/Makefile	Sat Mar 16 21:33:02 2013	(r314386)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	node
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.21
+PORTVERSION=	0.10.0
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://nodejs.org/dist/v${PORTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-v${PORTVERSION}
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	2.7
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
-CONFLICTS=	node-0.[0-79]* node-devel-0.[0-9]*
+CONFLICTS=	node-0.[02-9][0-9]* node-devel-0.[0-9]*
 
 ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=	i386 amd64
 MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
@@ -28,7 +28,6 @@ PREFIX_RELDEST=	${PREFIX:S,^${DESTDIR},,
 REINPLACE_ARGS=	-i ''
 
 post-patch:
-	@${RM} ${WRKSRC}/tools/wafadmin/Node.py.orig
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|' \
 		${WRKSRC}/deps/v8/build/common.gypi \
 		${WRKSRC}/deps/v8/tools/gyp/v8.gyp

Modified: head/www/node/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/node/distinfo	Sat Mar 16 21:15:33 2013	(r314385)
+++ head/www/node/distinfo	Sat Mar 16 21:33:02 2013	(r314386)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (node-v0.8.21.tar.gz) = e526f56d22bb2ebee5a607bd1e7a16dcc8530b916e3a372192e6cd5fa97d08e6
-SIZE (node-v0.8.21.tar.gz) = 12191813
+SHA256 (node-v0.10.0.tar.gz) = 1624dc37866ebfb5431e3393e6b049cf238cac8ad4d20c6d567263b1259177ab
+SIZE (node-v0.10.0.tar.gz) = 12777259

Added: head/www/node/files/patch-install
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/node/files/patch-install	Sat Mar 16 21:33:02 2013	(r314386)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- tools/install.py.orig	2013-03-16 20:43:57.000000000 +0000
++++ tools/install.py	2013-03-16 20:48:54.000000000 +0000
+@@ -119,7 +119,6 @@
+     assert(0) # unhandled action type
+ 
+ def files(action):
+-  action(['doc/node.1'], 'share/man/man1/')
+   action(['out/Release/node'], 'bin/node')
+ 
+   # install unconditionally, checking if the platform supports dtrace doesn't
